market_context: As of June 17, 2026, the U.S. stock market is experiencing mixed movements. The S&P 500 ETF (SPY) is trading at $751.32, up 0.13% from the previous close. The Nasdaq ETF (QQQ) is at $734.009, up 0.57%, while the Dow Jones ETF (DIA) is at $523.13, down 0.32%. Investors are closely watching the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meeting today, where the Federal Reserve is expected to maintain the federal funds rate at 3.50%–3.75%. Additionally, May's retail sales data will be released, providing further insights into consumer spending trends.
